## Mission Control

Systems builder focused on data structures, language experiments, and fast tooling.

I like projects where correctness and speed can both be inspected: data-structure workloads, language runtimes, CLI drills, and benchmark harnesses.

```text
focus      :: data structures | systems languages | benchmark tooling
current    :: building compact, testable implementations across languages
principle  :: small surface area, clear measurement, reproducible setup
```
